summary: Repeated episodes of stomachache in kids are frequently linked to non-physical issues such as stress or behavior; thus, mental health assessments should be considered first rather than focusing solely on physical conditions. Agent1 concluded based on studies indicating around two-thirds of undiagnosed recurring tummy troubles stem from emotions or behaviors instead of clear medical reasons.
